text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Another impressive victory for Agnes Digital! Just
how many G1s does she plan to take?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We run at every racecourse we can, and Agnes
Digital keeps on winning and winning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her acclaim resounds throughout the city.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, we are killin' it. Who'd have thunk I'd win
this much?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't even walk around the city without people
recognizing me and calling me that shhhweet
name...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's Agnes Digital!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Or should I say... the Ruler of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Ruler of the Mile? What happened to
All-Rounder?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Look! It's the Ruler of the Mile! The Ruler of the
Mile is here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's going on?! Have I entered some kinda
parallel universe?! I'm supposed to be the
All-Rounder...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious, we head to the library to check her race
records.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting. So, I looked over the
records to check on that question you had...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Based on your achievements, it appears "Ruler of
the Mile" is an appropriate title.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A junior-year G1 mile, the Oka Sho, the NHK
Mile Cup, the Mile Championship, the February
Stakes, the Victoria Mile, and the Yasuda Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You won all of them. It's an unprecedented
record. Honestly, they should be calling you
"Hero of the Mile."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, talk to me more, Ms. Librarian... And I
love... your glasses...hehe...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Uh? U-ummm...
choice_data_list: Thank you so much for your help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop the conversation from going off the rails. It
seems we unknowingly conquered all the
renowned mile races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is it me? Am I crazy???

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I don't know! Everyone was calling me the
All-Rounder, but now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's not that I don't like people calling me
the Ruler of the Mile. It's just... it might give
people the wrong impression, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Digitan's willing to simp in any distance! Simping
and I go together like Adam and Eve, tops and
bottoms, bad movies and scream queens!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I can't specialize in miles and be an all-rounder, so I'll have to pick one and stick to it... But which one?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Someone shows up as Agnes Digital ponders her
dilemma...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, if it isn't the Ruler of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Look, Flower! It's Digital! She's really been on fire lately...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hi, Agnes Digital. I watch all your races. Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If it's not any trouble, could I pick your brain
some time? I have a lot of respect for you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My brain?! BUT OF COURSE! My mind is an open
book to you, my precious angel!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Who knew my new reputation would allow me to
meet Umas I've barely had the chance to interact
with before?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, I think I can afford to derail a
bit! Heck, I may as well lean into it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mean, isn't that part of being an all-rounder in
the first place?! How could I forget?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can claim as many titles and meet as many
Umamusume as I want!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's decided, Trainer! From here on out, I'm gonna be the Ruler of All !

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I like both, so why reject what's offered? I should keep this up and dominate all races of all distances!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is far more than just a versatile
runner. She's proven herself to be one of the
fastest in history.
